latin: Praefectus de oppidanis suis locutus est: 'hi sunt homines terrae simplices — vulgus communis.' et post brevem pausam addidit: 'scis — stulti.'

questions.prompt: How does the sheriff describe his townspeople at first?
questions.target: Simple people of the earth — common folk
choices: Simple people of the earth — common folk

questions.prompt: What does he add after a pause?

translation: The sheriff spoke about his townspeople: 'These are simple people of the earth — the common folk.' And after a brief pause he added: 'You know — fools.'
